response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, executive leadership experience, or regulatory AI deployment history — key requirements for a CTO role in high-stakes fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems and real-time data handling (Dlang, microservices)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and talks
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10 people or building senior leadership layers
Lacks demonstrable experience in regulated fintech systems (credit risk, compliance, trade decisioning)
No clear track record in architecting model-agnostic, event-driven multi-agent frameworks at scale
